economic-left: Wealth should be redistributed to reduce inequality
Universal basic income would benefit society
Higher taxes on the wealthy are necessary
economic-center: Market-based solutions with safety nets work best
Progressive taxation should fund essential services
Balance between capitalism and social support is key
economic-right: Free markets create the most prosperity
Private sector solves problems better than government
social-progressive: Social justice and equality should be priorities
Systemic barriers must be actively dismantled
Individual rights include comprehensive civil liberties
social-moderate: Gradual reform is better than radical change
Respect both individual and community values
social-conservative: Family and community are foundations of society

bitcoin: Bitcoin is the only true decentralized currency
ethereum: Ethereum's flexibility makes it most useful
DeFi and NFTs show blockchain's potential
solana: Scalability and speed are crucial for adoption
User experience matters more than decentralization purity
skeptic: Blockchain solutions are looking for problems

christian: Faith in Christ provides meaning and purpose
jewish: Jewish tradition connects us to ancient wisdom
Jewish community and heritage are precious
muslim: Islam provides a complete way of life
buddhist: Compassion for all beings is essential

agnostic: Ultimate truth about deity is unknowable

rock: Rock culture celebrates rebellion and freedom
pop: Pop music brings joy to millions
jazz: Jazz history is American cultural treasure
classical: Classical music represents pinnacle of composition
electronic: Electronic music is frontier of innovation
hiphop: Hip-hop is powerful form of expression
Rap lyrics address real social issues

crisis: Climate change is an existential threat
Fossil fuel use must end within decades
